title: gladiolus mirus
intro: Gladiolus mirus, also known as the unusual gladiolus or desert candle, is a rare and unique species of the gladiolus family of flowering plants. This plant is known for its bright yellow and orange flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gladiolus mirus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and act as a natural remedy for digestive issues and skin conditions. Gladiolus mirus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
